---
name: Vibe Shift
about: Propose an aesthetic or atmospheric change
title: '[VIBE] '
labels: aesthetic, vibe-coding
assignees: ''

---

**What is the current "vibe"?**
Describe the current look and feel of the application.

**What is the proposed shift?**
Describe the new aesthetic (e.g., "Neon Brutalism", "Soft Academic", "Indie Web Cat").

**Sensory Changes**
- [ ] Color Palette
- [ ] Typography
- [ ] Cursors
- [ ] Audio/Soundscape
- [ ] Other:

**AI Negotiation Notes**
Why does this shift matter for the project's "living" identity?
